ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Lettere Memorabili, Istoriche, Politiche, Ed Erudite
ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Scritte, o Raccolte Da Antonio Bulifon, E dedicate All`Illustriss. ed Eccellentiss. Sign. D. Antonio Giudice Principe di Cellamare, &c.
ItacWorkItem.Notes:
246.b.30, pp. 177-215, contain two Academic speeches delivered by Luc`Antonio Porzio.
Andrea Magliar is the engraver of Leonardo Di Capoa`s portrait (246.b.32., p. 271).
On p. 271(246.b.32) the author mentions the Adornati Academy in Naples; on p. 280 the author mentions the Investiganti Academy.
(246.b.31), pp. 306-319, contains an Academic speech delivered by Bartolomeo Ceva Grimaldi, Duke of Telese, at the Uniti Academy in Naples.

Essay.EssayTitle: Antonio Bulifon all`Illustrissimo Signor D. Gio: Francesco Marciano Reggente nel Supremo Consiglio d`Italia, in Madrid: inviandogli un`orazione funerale fatta in morte del Signor Lionardo di Capoa (pp. 270-310)

ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
